pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer overflow risks in arithmetic operations without SafeMath protections. SWC-107 fits because the ownership mechanism is broken, allowing unauthorized access to critical functions. Evidence: Finding 6 shows inconsistent SafeMath usage for arithmetic operations (SWC-101).; Finding 9 identifies a critical broken ownership mechanism (SWC-107).; Finding 11 confirms access control flaws with newComer vs _owner inconsistency (SWC-107).
